NOTE: This extension is still in development, more info & images coming soon

Transform chrome default new tab into your own personalized home page.

Features

  • ◉ Inspirational beautiful photos
  • ◉ Custom Google searchbar
  • ◉ Time
  • ◉ Weather
  • ◉ Notes and ToDo list
  • ◉ Bookmarks
  • ◉ Customizable dashboard and widgets
